subject: Re: some ideas for carriage on the square
body:
Hi Hans,

Google just started prioritizing restaurants that have their full menu uploaded to their Business Profile. Most places in Greensburg haven't done it yet -- easy window to get ahead of the competition.

I still have those ideas for Carriage on the Square if you're interested. Happy to send them over.

Eric

P.S. The menu upload takes about 10 minutes in Google Business Profile if you want to grab it before your competitors do.
